title: Dropping default value definitions from a table does not work as expected
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_table (id UInt64, name String DEFAULT 'unknown', age Int32 DEFAULT 18, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
INSERT INTO test_table VALUES (DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT, DEFAULT);
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN name String DEFAULT 'unknown';
ALTER TABLE test_table MODIFY COLUMN age Int32 DEFAULT 18;
key_bug_features: Dropping default values from table columns fails
